title: 2025 Annual Impact Report
mission: We expand access to STEM education and mentorship for underserved youth in the Pacific Northwest.

programs.name: After-School Labs
programs.description: Weekly hands-on science and coding sessions in 22 Title I schools, with transportation and meals provided.

programs.name: Summer Bridge
programs.description: Six-week intensive program pairing rising 9th graders with industry mentors and college readiness workshops.

programs.name: Family STEM Nights
programs.description: Quarterly community events engaging 1,200+ families in project-based learning and resource fairs.

thank_you: Thank you to our donors, volunteers, and partner schools. Your generosity made every program in this report possible. Together we are building pathways to opportunity.
